changes_summary: Extracted sidebar visibility filter logic into reusable utilities (buildHiddenRepositoryPathSet, filterWorktreesByVisibility) in src/lib/sidebar-utils.ts to improve readability of Sidebar.tsx. Promoted UpdateRepositoryResponse to the canonical type name in api-client.ts (previously the alias was on the wrong side of the relationship after Issue #690 broadened the response shape). Wrapped pending-promise resolution in act() inside RepositoryList.test.tsx to silence the 'update was not wrapped in act(...)' warnings emitted by the 'disables the toggle while a request is in flight' test. No behavioral changes.
refactorings_applied: Extracted Sidebar visibility filter into pure helper functions in sidebar-utils.ts
Replaced two inline useMemo bodies in Sidebar.tsx with calls to the new helpers (DRY, SRP)
Renamed UpdateRepositoryDisplayNameResponse <-> UpdateRepositoryResponse so the canonical name reflects the post-#690 shape, alias retained for back-compat
Wrapped fireEvent-triggered async state update in act() inside RepositoryList.test.tsx

test_results.scope: Issue #690 related test files (db-migrations, db-repository-exclusion, repository-visibility, RepositoryList, Sidebar-visibility)

broader_run.regression_check: No regressions: full unit suite (342 files / 6434 tests / 7 skipped) passes.

commits: d5f95637: refactor(#690): extract sidebar visibility helpers and fix act() warnings
notes: All four improvement goals from refactor-context.json were addressed: (1) act() warnings on RepositoryList.test.tsx are gone, (2) RepositorySummary.visible/enabled usage was reviewed and confirmed consistent across api-client.ts, useWorktreesCache.ts, WorktreesCacheProvider.tsx, WorktreeSelectionContext.tsx, and Sidebar.tsx (visible default true, enabled default true, both surfaced from the worktrees API and threaded through the cache to the Sidebar), (3) Sidebar.tsx visibility filter is now a 3-line composition over two named helpers in sidebar-utils.ts instead of two anonymous useMemo bodies, (4) the UpdateRepositoryDisplayNameResponse / UpdateRepositoryResponse alias relationship was inverted so the canonical name reflects the post-#690 shape. No DB layer changes were necessary - db-repository.ts and worktree-db.ts visible/enabled handling was already clean and well-documented. Migration v31 file was reviewed and is already minimal. WorktreesCacheProvider.tsx and useWorktreesCache.ts were reviewed and contained no dead code. All 6434 unit tests still pass; lint, type-check, and build all succeed.
